DC0426F04C3284483349F785D67232F2: Found on an island <Yel>far, far away</>.
2A42F5C148E0FC181A4AAC9202841523: Lumbering and peaceful herd animals, Banthas are used as mounts for Tusken Raiders on Tatooine. Give them a friendly scratch or snack and they'll drop <emphasis>Heavy Wool</>. When assigned to a <emphasis>Barn</>, Banthas will produce even more items depending on what they’re fed. When eliminated they will drop <emphasis>Robust Meat</>.
B22C32664DA90412DBEA6A8F8660DC45: Peaceful and contemplative. Good source of fertilizer and  <emphasis>Heavy Wool</>.
